api: Cart.com store REST API (self-hosted store base_url; https://developers.cart.com)
scope: Pass B expansion of the practical read collection surface: orders, customers, products, and inventory. Mutations remain excluded because the legacy connector has no reverse-ETL write contract.

excluded.reason: order creation is a business mutation with nested fulfillment/payment semantics; the legacy connector exposes no reverse-ETL contract or approved record schema for creating orders
product update is a mutation surface; the legacy connector is read-only and this bundle does not declare a reviewed write schema/risk contract for product edits
